title_en: Egg-cellent Nutrition: How to Cook the Perfect Egg
title_es: Nutrición de Huevos: Cómo Cocinar el Huevo Perfecto
hook_en: You won't believe how easy it is to get perfect eggs!
hook_es: ¡No creerás lo fácil que es hacer huevos perfectos!
key_message: Eggs are nutrient powerhouses — cook them right to keep all the goodness.
visual_elements: close-up of a raw egg in a bowl
comparison of runny vs. overcooked yolks
quick montage of different cooking methods with a runny yolk
final shot of a beautifully cooked egg
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Eggs — One of the most nutrient-dense foods — contain all 9 essential amino acids (Tip: Keep the yolk runny when possible — high heat oxidizes the cholesterol)

title_en: Sunny Side Up: Maximize Egg Nutrition
title_es: Huevos Soleados: Maximiza la Nutrición del Huevo
hook_en: Want all 9 essential amino acids? Cook your eggs like this!
hook_es: ¿Quieres los 9 aminoácidos esenciales? ¡Cocina tus huevos así!
key_message: Keep egg yolks runny to preserve nutrients and enjoy all 9 essential amino acids.
visual_elements: sequence of cracking an egg on a pan with a sunny-side-up technique
zoom in on the runny yolk
pop-up text listing 9 essential amino acids
enjoying a perfectly cooked sunny-side-up egg
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Eggs — One of the most nutrient-dense foods — contain all 9 essential amino acids (Tip: Keep the yolk runny when possible — high heat oxidizes the cholesterol)
